summary: Time-Based Notification Scheduler (APScheduler) fully tested. All 17 backend tests passed. Scheduler is running with 3 jobs correctly configured: appointment_reminders (5min interval), pending_session_notes (15min interval), subscription_expiry (daily at 9AM IST). Manual job trigger works for super admin only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scheduler feature complete. APIs tested: GET /api/scheduler/status (returns is_running=true, 3 jobs), POST /api/scheduler/run/{job_id} (super admin only), GET /api/scheduler/logs (super admin only). Jobs: appointment_reminders (5min), pending_session_notes (15min), subscription_expiry (daily 9AM IST). All access controls working correctly.

scheduler_status_api.notes: Returns is_running=true and list of 3 jobs with correct intervals

manual_job_trigger.notes: Super admin can trigger all 3 jobs. Therapist gets 403. Invalid job returns 400.

scheduler_logs.notes: Super admin only. Supports limit and job_id filters.

job_intervals.notes: appointment_reminders: interval[0:05:00], pending_session_notes: interval[0:15:00], subscription_expiry: cron[hour='9', minute='0']

access_control.notes: Therapist can view status but cannot trigger jobs or view logs. Super admin has full access.

scheduler_jobs_verified.name: Check Appointment Reminders
scheduler_jobs_verified.description: Checks for appointments 55-65 mins and 25-35 mins in future, sends reminders

scheduler_jobs_verified.name: Check Pending Session Notes
scheduler_jobs_verified.description: Checks completed appointments from last 24 hours without linked notes

scheduler_jobs_verified.name: Check Subscription Expiry
scheduler_jobs_verified.description: Warns therapists about expiring subscriptions at 7/3/1 days before
